name: badgehub-app
description: > Node.js REST service for the BadgeHub

scripts.dev:browser: concurrently -k -c 'auto' 'npm run dev:sw --workspace=packages/frontend' 'VITE_ENABLE_BROWSER_BACKEND=true npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend'
scripts.dev:backend: npm run test-db:up && npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.dump-db: docker exec -it badgehub-db /usr/bin/pg_dump --username badgehub --schema badgehub badgehub > mockup-data.sql
scripts.check:colors:
bash -c 'result=$(grep -rn --include="*.tsx" -E "\b(bg|text|border|ring)-(gray|slate|zinc|stone|red|orange|amber|yellow|lime|green|emerald|teal|cyan|sky|blue|indigo|violet|purple|fuchsia|pink|rose)-[0-9]+" packages/frontend/src); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "$result"; echo "
ERROR: Hardcoded Tailwind color classes found. Use DaisyUI semantic tokens instead."; exit 1; fi'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run check:ts && npm run check:colors && npm run build && npm run test
